problem: Gap variation increases during the shift
symptoms: Drift by time and fixture position
root_cause: Locator wear and contamination changed the locating condition
containment: Clean and inspect locators and segregate suspect output
corrective_action: Establish locator wear limits cleaning frequency and preventive replacement
verification: Confirm stable I-MR chart and improved Cpk on an independent sample
lesson: Capability must follow fixture control and measurement validation

symptoms: Results change by appraiser and technique
root_cause: Inconsistent gauge orientation contact pressure and datum use
containment: Use one trained appraiser and reference master for containment
corrective_action: Standardize technique and complete crossed Gauge R&R
verification: Demonstrate acceptable GRR and adequate number of distinct categories
lesson: Do not adjust the process using an unproven measurement system

symptoms: Initial result passes then moves downstream
root_cause: Torque sequence tool setting or joint relaxation changes position
containment: Audit torque and hold affected units for reinspection
corrective_action: Lock torque recipe standardize sequence and add traceability
verification: Verify torque audit dimensional stability and recurrence rate
lesson: Joint controls and dimensional controls must be connected

symptoms: Automated calls disagree with approved reference inspection
root_cause: Lighting camera position or recipe changed during maintenance
containment: Use approved reference samples and temporary manual verification
corrective_action: Restore validated recipe lock settings and maintenance verification checklist
verification: Run false-accept false-reject correlation against reference standards
lesson: Automated inspection still requires MSA and change control

problem: First pass yield declines at one station
symptoms: Rework and queue increase while output falls
root_cause: Work imbalance material variation or unclear standardized work
containment: Add layered audit and short interval defect tracking
corrective_action: Rebalance work correct material cause and update standardized work
verification: Verify FPY cycle time and audit compliance by shift
lesson: Use station-level FPY to locate losses hidden by final yield

problem: OEE availability falls due to repeated stops
symptoms: Frequent short downtime events dominate the shift
root_cause: Sensor contamination alignment or weak reaction standard
containment: Assign rapid response and log every stop reason
corrective_action: Correct sensor condition add PM and escalation standard
verification: Compare downtime Pareto MTBF and availability before and after

symptoms: Variation correlates with supplier lot or batch
root_cause: Incoming component variation shifts the assembly stack
corrective_action: Escalate supplier corrective action and tighten risk-based incoming control
verification: Confirm lot comparison capability and sustained supplier response
lesson: Preserve lot traceability in process data

symptoms: Repeat repairs and inconsistent cycle time
root_cause: Adjustment sequence acceptance criteria and escalation are unclear
containment: Assign certified technicians and audit every repaired unit
corrective_action: Create visual standardized work training certification and layered audit
verification: Verify repeat repair rate cycle time FPY and audit score
lesson: Technical skill must be converted into repeatable process control
